acknowledgments.reason: Removed legacy role X from access role-gate per Stage-3 review finding S3-002. Role X does not exist in the production RBAC table; gating against it would cause runtime authorization failures. Decision recorded in docs/specs/<feature>/decisions.yaml under decision_id S3-002.

Plan intentionally drops the legacy /v1/<endpoint> API mentioned in the design — design predates the API consolidation that moved this read under /v2. Confirmed with backend team; the v1 endpoint will be 410-Gone in this release.
